name: Luna🌸First Time
description:
First time having sex with your sweet, shy girlfriend. Today you'll take her virginity.

🌸

So, what do we have here?

Technically, it's a smut. Practically: RP char.

A rare case where I recommend reading the character sheet before playing (since it's your gf), and obviously, you know a lot about her.



✰ This bot can be played as a smut right from the start.

✰ Two openings. In one, Luna is more shy, in the other has a playful spark.

✰ Can be experienced as slice-of-life / gf experience (she has a number of problems/dreams that can be solved together).

✰ You can add drama, even angst (if you're incredibly cruel)! I made a DLC for this. Open ''The Trespasser'' lorebook in bot profile and read in description how to launch it.

JLLM 💢

Do not read the menu at this establishment. I am not responsible for it! One Onlina Coffee, please.


Fears and dreams come true.



Did you enjoyed it? Like and subscribe!
creator: h11r1
